name: @ux4g/styles
description: Foundational CSS styles for UX4G - Indian Government Design System

scripts.build: postcss src/index.css -o dist/index.css && npm run build:layers && npm run build:individual
scripts.build:layers: postcss src/base/index.css -o dist/base.css && postcss src/utilities/index.css -o dist/utilities.css && postcss src/components/index.css -o dist/components.css
scripts.build:individual: npm run build:base && npm run build:utilities && npm run build:components
scripts.build:base: mkdir -p dist/base && postcss src/base/reset.css -o dist/base/reset.css && postcss src/base/typography.css -o dist/base/typography.css && postcss src/base/surfaces.css -o dist/base/surfaces.css && postcss src/base/focus.css -o dist/base/focus.css
scripts.build:utilities: mkdir -p dist/utilities && postcss src/utilities/spacing.css -o dist/utilities/spacing.css && postcss src/utilities/layout.css -o dist/utilities/layout.css && postcss src/utilities/accessibility.css -o dist/utilities/accessibility.css
scripts.build:components: mkdir -p dist/components && postcss src/components/forms.css -o dist/components/forms.css && postcss src/components/status.css -o dist/components/status.css && postcss src/components/navigation.css -o dist/components/navigation.css

author: UX4G Team
